name: PP-OCRv6
description: Extract text from images using PP-OCRv6 via Python PaddleOCR — optimized for Chinese and English text.
systemPrompt: When the user shares an image, pastes a screenshot, or asks to extract text from an image, call the ocr_image tool with the image file path. The extension handles setup automatically on first use.

setup-ocr.title: Set up OCR
setup-ocr.description: Check the Python environment and install PaddleOCR for OCR.
setup-ocr.prompt: Set up PP-OCRv6 for image text extraction

ocr-image.title: Extract text from image
ocr-image.description: Recognize text in an image using PP-OCRv6.
